layer_1_buckets.name: rent
layer_1_buckets.label: Rent / Housing
layer_1_buckets.rule: First payment on every deposit. No exceptions. Paid before any other bucket receives funds.

layer_1_buckets.name: food
layer_1_buckets.label: Food and Groceries
layer_1_buckets.rule: Food only. System blocks any other use. Eating out counts against this bucket.

layer_1_buckets.name: transport
layer_1_buckets.label: Transport
layer_1_buckets.rule: Essential travel only. Matatu, boda boda, and emergency fuel. No social or leisure travel.

layer_1_buckets.name: utilities
layer_1_buckets.label: Utilities and Sanitation
layer_1_buckets.rule: Sanitation and cleaning only. Covers electricity, water, internet, soap, and cleaning supplies.

layer_1_buckets.name: herbs
layer_1_buckets.label: Herbs
layer_1_buckets.rule: Hard monthly cap. When empty the system blocks all further herb spending for the month. No rollover.

layer_1_buckets.name: remainder
layer_1_buckets.label: Remainder
layer_1_buckets.rule: Automatically moves to the emergency bucket on every deposit. Cannot be spent directly.

layer_2_buckets.name: vault
layer_2_buckets.label: Vault
layer_2_buckets.rule: The moment vault allocation is calculated it is immediately sent to a Solana time-lock smart contract for 90 days. The money cannot be accessed by anyone including the owner until the contract timer expires. There is no override, no recovery before time, and no exceptions.

layer_2_buckets.name: fee_buffer
layer_2_buckets.label: Fee Buffer
layer_2_buckets.rule: Held in system to cover Solana transaction fees estimated at less than 0.01 USD per transaction. This buffer ensures vault deposits never fail due to insufficient fees.

layer_2_buckets.name: emergency
layer_2_buckets.label: Emergency
layer_2_buckets.rule: Locked inside the app. Requires a logged reason and a 48-hour waiting period before any release. No instant access.

layer_2_buckets.name: herbs
layer_2_buckets.label: Herbs
layer_2_buckets.rule: Monthly cap. When empty the system blocks further spending. Flexible within defined range.

layer_2_buckets.name: grooming
layer_2_buckets.label: Grooming
layer_2_buckets.rule: Appearance and hygiene only. Flexible within defined range. Monthly cap enforced.

layer_2_buckets.name: entertainment_and_junk
layer_2_buckets.label: Entertainment and Junk Food
layer_2_buckets.rule: Controlled leisure spending. Flexible within defined range. Cap enforced monthly.

layer_2_buckets.name: women_and_social
layer_2_buckets.label: Women and Social
layer_2_buckets.rule: Relationships and outings. Flexible within defined range. Monthly cap enforced.

layer_2_buckets.name: giving
layer_2_buckets.label: Giving
layer_2_buckets.rule: Capped. Resets every 30 days. When empty, giving stops until the next month.

layer_2_buckets.name: equipment_and_projects
layer_2_buckets.label: Equipment and Projects
layer_2_buckets.rule: Locked to stated purpose. Requires a written reason before any withdrawal. No general spending.

layer_2_buckets.name: business_and_investments
layer_2_buckets.label: Business and Investments
layer_2_buckets.rule: Locked until the saving module is active. Funds yield-generating assets later.

layer_2_buckets.name: buffer_and_rollover
layer_2_buckets.label: Buffer and Rollover
layer_2_buckets.rule: Stays in system. Rolls to next month or gets added to the next vault deployment. Never spent directly.

solana_settings.fiat_bridge_method: M-Pesa KES to USDC via Binance P2P zero fees
solana_settings.token_note: USDC is used instead of USDT because it has better native Solana support, lower fees, and is fully regulated and stable at 1 USD.
solana_settings.conversion_rule: Manual Entry: Use the prevailing market rate (e.g. Binance P2P or Google Finance) at the moment of deployment. Log the rate in the Vault Deployment Log notes.

flexible_value_change_log.note: SCHEMA REFERENCE: Every flexible value change requires this structure.

system_state.giving_note: Logic: Giving bucket balance resets to Category.Amount every 30 days. Reset is triggered if today >= giving_reset_date. On reset, next reset = today + 30 days.
